Diabetes self management plan30-Apr-2018Prediabetes
  • Reduce body weight to target range to lower diabetes risk.
  • Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% to prevent progression to diabetes.
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce metabolic risk.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension15-Mar-2010Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Achieve and maintain systolic blood pressure below 130 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
  • Achieve and maintain diastolic blood pressure below 80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
  • Achieve weight loss to support blood pressure control as part of hypertension management.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes per week of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity to help control blood pressure.
  • Reduce dietary sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day to support blood pressure control.
